name: A Batch of Bubbles
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Glycerine (can be purchased in most pharmacies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a flat container such as a dishpan or baking pan.
2. Make bubbles with purchased wands, but it's much more fun to make your own bubble blowers from items you find around the house. For example, poke the bottom out of a paper cup and dip the end in the mixture; also try a slotted spoon, a plastic berry basket, and drinking straws.
